results.overview: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends by using scary movies as part of a deadly game.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a new killer has donned the Ghostface mask and begins targeting a group of teenagers to resurrect secrets from the town’s deadly past.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.
results.title: Scream 7

results.overview: A group of people on a rafting excursion happen upon a deserted town and decide to set up camp. Out of the blue, a murder occurs.
results.title: Scream

known_for.name: Level up, au cœur de l'esport français
known_for.original_name: Level up, au cœur de l'esport français

results.overview: An experimental essay film about terrorism, media, violence and globalisation. Three infotainment news broadcasts - a rollercoaster, a hijacking, and an influencer - are soundtracked by pulsating experimental electronics that push the psychic residue of a post war-on-terror world out of the unconscious and onto the screen. Capitalism, imperialism, desire; all three are implicated in a nihilism that has seeped from the news into the social psyche.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: A young collage student faces a mysterious man is a ghost mask.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: Casey, a wealthy yet naive city girl, prepares for a cozy night alone. Her routine is shattered when an unknown call becomes increasingly disturbing. The man on the phone isn’t just talking, he’s playing a game, and Casey is the only one who doesn’t know the rules. Will she outsmart him before it’s too late?
results.title: Scream

results.overview: Gaby, 10 years old, receives a call from a stranger who tries to terrify her with questions about horror movies, hoping to trap her. With humor and intelligence, Gaby turns the situation around, transforming the threat into a hilarious parody.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: It is the expressive face of a young gir  Carola Schmidt sensitively transforms the documentary video material she produced of a psychological portrait into a poetic study. The portrayed is the figure of a female fan of the band Tokio-Hotel in a concert situation. The starting point for the work is the type of fan as an individual. There is an exchange of monstrous energies with cathartic effects typical of these ecstatic states. Of course, well-known symptoms of 'fan culture' are called up through your work: unfulfilled longings, the desire to be one with the crowd, the merging of the self in the collective, the positive feelings that are shown to the star as a projection surface and the associated desire to function as a form of self-awareness through self-ingratiation.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: MS-DOS demoscene short film that showcases computer animation and music.
results.title: Scream

results.overview: In 1996, the horror master Wes Craven unleashed Scream, a slasher movie aimed at a whole new generation of teenage movie-goers.
results.title: Scream: The Inside Story

results.overview: Following the latest Ghostface killings, the four survivors leave Woodsboro behind and start a fresh chapter.
results.title: Scream VI

results.name: The Scream
results.overview: Vitória Neves, a strong woman and dedicated teacher, always focused on solving the problems of her students and colleagues, even if this means leaving her personal life and family balance behind. The ones who suffer most are Pedro, her teenage son, and Salvador, her husband. Sofia Neves, Vitória's sister, an artist who lives in London, is opening her first major exhibition when she receives the news of Vitória's suicide.

results.name: Scream Queens
results.overview: The super-charged comedy-horror series is a modern take on the classic whodunit with a killer cast.
Two years after the Woodsboro murders, Sidney Prescott acclimates to college life while someone donning the Ghostface costume begins a new string of killings.
results.title: Scream 2

results.overview: As bodies begin dropping around the Hollywood set of STAB 3, the third film based on the gruesome Woodsboro killings, Sidney and other survivors are once again terrorized by another Ghostface killer.
results.title: Scream 3

known_for.overview: An American man unwittingly gets involved with werewolves who have developed a serum allowing them to transform at will.
known_for.title: An American Werewolf in Paris

known_for.overview: Bill Whitney is worried that he is different to his sister and parents. They mix with other upper-class people while Bill is more down to earth. Even his girlfriend seems a bit odd. All is revealed when Bill returns home to find a party in full swing.
known_for.title: Society

known_for.original_title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
known_for.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.
known_for.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest

results.name: Scream: The TV Series
results.overview: What starts as a YouTube video going viral, soon leads to problems for the teenagers of Lakewood and serves as the catalyst for a murder that opens up a window to the town's troubled past. Everyone has secrets. Everyone tells lies. Everyone is fair game.
